hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/artifacts/.last-learn" ] && [ $(find "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/artifacts/.last-learn" -mmin -30 2>/dev/null | wc -l) -gt 0 ]; then exit 0; else echo '⚠️  Consider running /learn first to preserve durable knowledge before compaction. Ctrl+C to abort and run /learn, or let compaction proceed.' >&2; exit 0; fi
